single_spawn_policy.goal: complete all assigned witnesses in one worker spawn
continue_without_confirmation: proof plan mismatch that can be repaired locally
allowed_local_repairs: add proved case_lib helpers ending with helper_namespace.suffix
add official Rocq library imports needed by current group helpers/proofs
create and rerun debug scripts under tooling.coqtop_debug_script
terminal_blocked_only_for: assigned witness statement malformed or missing
required premise cannot be derived from assigned VC or current case_lib after concrete attempts
fixed coq_tooling command cannot run after command evidence

state_reports.stale: report stale when source_goal_version is no longer current
state_reports.compact_error: report compact-error only as a compaction fact; controller/main decides retry or final blocker

single_spawn_policy.controller_acceptance_model: parent verify validates merged proof after worker returns

tooling.coq_tooling_check_command: python3 /home/yangfp/QCIP/.agents/skills/vc-proving/scripts/coq_tooling.py check --workspace-root /home/yangfp/QCIP/worktrees/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-proving-r1/group_00__shared_avl_rotation_fold --build-workspace /home/yangfp/QCIP/worktrees/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/_coq_builds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-proving-r1/group_00__shared_avl_rotation_fold/src --target-file .coq_group_checks/xizi_avl_left_rotate_group_00__shared_avl_rotation_fold_check.v --target-kind group-check --source-goal-version 811b046ad0c8852547bbc7bbaf63ca0b034be1bcab4ce9471bbf2ccb156afd52 --group-check-case-theory SimpleC.EE.Verification.xizi.xizi_avl_left_rotate --group-check-require xizi_avl_left_rotate_goal --group-check-require xizi_avl_left_rotate_proof_auto --group-check-require xizi_avl_left_rotate_proof_manual --assigned-witness proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_entail_wit_1 --assigned-witness proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_return_wit_1
tooling.proof_manual_check_reason: worker group evidence must use build-workspace-only group-check; parent verify runs full goal_check

group_manifest.proof_strategy: For each theorem, unfold its definition and choose the left side of the outer disjunction. Derive all addr_avl_tree constructor-component equalities from the exact model hypotheses. For the entail witness, fold the old-root raw fields into avl_node_fields and cancel the already matching subtree/local-variable resources. For the return witness, instantiate the exact rotated after model, fold the old root with avl_node_fields_fold plus store_addr_avl_node_rev, then fold the promoted node the same way; unfold avl_left_rotation and discharge it from PreH4.

group_entry.proof_strategy: For each theorem, unfold its definition and choose the left side of the outer disjunction. Derive all addr_avl_tree constructor-component equalities from the exact model hypotheses. For the entail witness, fold the old-root raw fields into avl_node_fields and cancel the already matching subtree/local-variable resources. For the return witness, instantiate the exact rotated after model, fold the old root with avl_node_fields_fold plus store_addr_avl_node_rev, then fold the promoted node the same way; unfold avl_left_rotation and discharge it from PreH4.
group_entry.natural_language_proof_strategy: Constructor injectivity aligns the symbolic-execution names with the public model, after which existing shared AVL fold lemmas reconstruct exactly the required tree ownership and exact rotation relation.
group_entry.natural_language_proof_pattern: constructor injectivity -> avl_root_addr simplification -> inner-node fold -> outer-node fold -> exact rotation witness
proving_hints: Prefer the first disjunct of each generated witness; the diagnostics split goals are hints for another generated branch and are not target witnesses.
Use only shared QCIPLib.xizi.xizi_avl_common declarations; do not add a case-private dependency.
No helper is expected: avl_node_fields_fold, store_addr_avl_node_rev, and the definition of avl_left_rotation are sufficient.
Avoid every forbidden lemma listed by the orchestrator; none is needed for this proof pattern.
group_entry.grouping_reason: Both targets are tightly related obligations from one two-write AVL rotation and share one coherent proof route. A single group minimizes worker spawns while remaining far below max_witnesses_per_group=12.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_entail_wit: left disjunct; inject model equalities; fold avl_node_fields; cancel
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_return_wit: left disjunct; inject promoted model equality; instantiate after; fold old root then promoted root; unfold rotation relation

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_entail_wit: left disjunct; inject model equalities; fold avl_node_fields; cancel
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_avl_left_rotate_return_wit: left disjunct; inject promoted model equality; instantiate after; fold old root then promoted root; unfold rotation relation

vc_checking_plan.fallback_policy: if plan fields are missing or weak, analyze assigned witnesses locally in this same spawn

handoff.rendered_instructions_compact:
Read /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-proving-r1/groups/group_00__shared_avl_rotation_fold/group_worker_input.json.
The goal is to complete the group-worker task assigned by group_worker_input.json; /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260715125530/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-vc-proving-r1/groups/group_00__shared_avl_rotation_fold/group_worker_report.json is only the final report file recording the result.
Before acting, read group_worker_input.json completely and read every skill or rule file listed under handoff.detailed_rules.skill_docs.
The group_worker_input.json, group_workers_manifest.json, declared group worktree, declared source_goal_version, and current files are the source of truth.
Do not rely on parent chat history or unstated assumptions as task context or evidence.
Minimize respawns: solve every assigned witness in this group inside this same spawn whenever the source_goal_version and helper namespace are still current.
Do not stop for confirmation about proof uncertainty, missing optional hints, or a failed tactic; inspect the proof state, try an alternate route, add current-suffix helpers when useful, and re-run the fixed group check.
Work only in the declared group worktree; write only the declared group_worker_report.json, group_worker_output.txt, assigned witness proof bodies, current group-suffixed case_lib helpers, and official Rocq library imports needed by those proofs.
No compromise operations: do not weaken specifications, bypass required checks, fake evidence, change generated files by hand, change witness statements, edit unassigned witnesses, edit seed case_lib declarations, add unsuffixed or foreign-suffix helpers, add non-Rocq/project/generated case_lib imports, add Admitted/Axiom, or use forbidden tools/tactics.
Task completion means the assigned group proof work is completed under the strict workflow, with a terminal group status, solved/unsolved witnesses, blockers or errors, changed-files details, helper/import declarations, source_goal_version-bound Coq evidence, and an output note satisfying output_contract.
Controller/parent verification acceptance is separate; do not claim group acceptance or final proof acceptance unless the controller writes it.
Reuse only references explicitly declared in group_worker_input.json; previous output notes are non-authoritative and lose conflicts to JSON, manifests, source versions, and current files.
Compact-error is not your blocked judgment; report it only as a compaction fact and let controller/main decide retry or final blocker.
If the strict workflow cannot be completed, write a blocked, stale, or compact-error result with concrete evidence instead of improvising around the process.

formal_edit_rules.proof_manual: edit assigned witness proof bodies only
formal_edit_rules.case_lib: add proved helper declarations and official Rocq library imports only; every new helper name must end with helper_namespace.suffix; new imports must be Require Import Coq.* or From Coq... Require Import ...
